description: Secure OpenClaw skill marketplace — verified alternative to ClawHub

userStories.title: Beautiful responsive frontend
userStories.description: Build a complete, beautiful dark-themed frontend that works on mobile and desktop.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page with hero section, stats (verified skills, installs, pending), feature highlights
Skill browser with category filter tabs (All, Productivity, AI, Smart Home, Finance, Developer)
Search bar that filters skills in real-time
Skill cards with name, description, author, score badge (color coded), install count, star rating
Sort by: Most Installed, Top Rated, Security Score, Newest
Click a skill card opens detail modal with full info + install command
Submit form page where developers can submit their skill (name, description, GitHub URL, author, category)
Status tracker page showing scan progress after submission
All API calls go to /api/* (same origin)
Dark theme: background #0a0a0a, cards #111, accent #7c3aed (purple)
No external dependencies except fetch API

userStories.title: Admin panel
userStories.description: Password-protected admin panel to review and approve/reject submitted skills.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin panel accessible at /admin
Login form with admin token (stored in localStorage)
Review queue showing all pending/scanning/failed skills
Each item shows: name, author, GitHub URL, scan score, scan issues list
Approve button (green) — moves skill to verified
Reject button (red) with reason input
Rescan button — re-runs security scan
Delete button — removes skill entirely
Stats bar at top: total verified, pending, failed
Auto-refreshes every 10 seconds when there are pending scans
All admin API calls include Authorization: Bearer <token> header

userStories.title: Railway deployment config
userStories.description: Configure the app for free deployment on Railway.app.
acceptanceCriteria: requirements.txt with all Python dependencies (fastapi, uvicorn, pydantic)
Procfile: web: uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT
railway.json or railway.toml with correct build config
README.md deploy section with step-by-step Railway deploy instructions
Environment variables documented: ADMIN_TOKEN
Backend serves frontend static files from /frontend/index.html on all non-API routes
App runs correctly with: cd /path/to/clawvault && python backend/main.py

userStories.title: Real skill submission flow end-to-end
userStories.description: Test that the full submission → scan → approval flow works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/submit with valid GitHub URL returns 200 with skill_id and status='scanning'
GET /api/status/:skill_id returns current scan status
After scan completes, skill appears in GET /api/skills if score >= 80
GET /api/admin/queue (with admin token) shows pending skills
POST /api/admin/approve/:id moves skill to verified
POST /api/admin/reject/:id with reason moves skill to rejected
GET /api/stats returns correct counts
All endpoints return proper JSON error messages on failure
